signals.headline: Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Dominate Polymarket Trending Discussions | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Dominate Polymarket Trending Discussions | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Polymarket's top trending markets focus on **Elon Musk tweet volumes**, such as "Elon Musk # tweets April 20 - April 22, 2026?" under Tweet Markets and "Elon Musk musk # tweets in April 2026?" (18% odds for 1120-1159 range, $10M volume, $541K liquidity).[1][2][3]

signals.headline: No Whale Bets or Smart Money Moves Reported on X | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
No Whale Bets or Smart Money Moves Reported on X | NO | HIGH confidence**  
Search results show no specific X posts about whale bets, smart money activity, or prediction tips; one Binance post mentions a Polymarket analytics tool for tracking top traders but lacks details on current moves.[4]

signals.headline: No Trending Mispriced Markets or Tips on X | NO | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
No Trending Mispriced Markets or Tips on X | NO | MEDIUM confidence**  
While markets like Musk's April tweet ranges (e.g., 40-64 at 100% in one example) imply crowd consensus, no X chatter on mispriced opportunities or imminent moves appears in results; general tools for analytics exist but no live buzz.[2][3][4]
